title: Limiter
wikitext:
[[Image:Eva2-22 C1517.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Eva-02 ejecting limiters]]

'''Limiters''' (or '''restrictors''') are control rod-like devices embedded in the upper arms and back of an Eva unit in the Rebuild continuity. They seem to play a role similar to the "restraints" in the original, in inhibiting the Evas' innate power. Eva-02 is shown ejecting its limiters to enter [[Beast Mode]], and Eva-01's are said to "vanish" (??) after it reactivates against the [[Zeruel|Tenth Angel]].

{{stub}}

Limiters (or restrictors) are control rod-like devices embedded in the upper arms and back of an Eva unit in the Rebuild continuity. They seem to play a role similar to the "restraints" in the original, in inhibiting the Evas' innate power. Eva-02 is shown ejecting its limiters to enter Beast Mode, and Eva-01's are said to "vanish" (??) after it reactivates against the Tenth Angel.


This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!

Article: Limiter
thumb|right|250px|Eva-02 ejecting limiters

Limiters (or restrictors) are control rod-like devices embedded in the upper arms and back of an Eva unit in the Rebuild continuity. They seem to play a role similar to the "restraints" in the original, in inhibiting the Evas' innate power. Eva-02 is shown ejecting its limiters to enter Beast Mode, and Eva-01's are said to "vanish" (??) after it reactivates against the Tenth Angel.
